title: lindera obtusiloba
intro: Lindera obtusiloba, also known as Korean spiceberry, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lindera obtusiloba include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in the digestion of food. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, or as a spice to add flavor to various dishes.
